Ending mappings re-verified against the wiki's The Ticket and Endings pages on 2026-07-11 (see decisions[].confidence and top-level sources).

stages.name: Escape Ground Zero
stages.hint: Complete tutorial raid behind SkySide building

stages.name: Reach Prapor LL2

stages.name: 30 PMC kills on Woods; 100 dogtags

stages.hint: Survivor: evidence folders to SSD, 50 kills on Streets, 4 PMCs in one raid; failing costs your Kappa container

stages.name: Arrive at the Terminal entrance
stages.hint: Bring your ending's access item: Kerman keycard (Savior), unknown-name keycard (Debtor), Prapor's letter (Survivor), Prapor hash-codes keycard (Fallen); 21:00-06:00

stages.hint: Case-kept branch

stages.hint: Eliminate 30 targets on Reserve, yellow flare at the Woods transit, then AMG-10 to Prapor

stages.hint: Ship raid, 1-3 players

stages.name: Access the engine room

stages.hint: Three hard drives: shelves, workstation area, servers

stages.name: Decode the hard drives
stages.hint: Hand Mechanic 3 FIR Ultralink modules, 4 FIR server RAM modules, 2 FIR cryptographic processors; analyse the data

stages.name: Arrange the scientist's evacuation
stages.hint: BTR driver errands: smuggler conflict, 20 kills on the icebreaker, 5 respirators, 2 class-5+ plates, Kirasa-N armor

stages.name: Ask how the rescue went

decisions.question: What did you do with the armored case?

effects.notes: 1.5M roubles handing it over directly (1M if you pretend you didn't find it); 'Man of His Word' achievement. The Ticket: must recover the case via Lightkeeper (Blue Folders chain on Lighthouse/Interchange). Survivor buyout costs 300M roubles. Boreas transport: AMG-10 fluid hand-in only. No ending is locked.

-0.3 Prapor rep; 'Just Business' achievement; skip the Lightkeeper case-recovery chain in The Ticket. Survivor buyout costs 500M roubles; Fallen route adds Prapor's tasks (50 electronics, secure container, 40 repair kits). Boreas transport adds 3x FIR Military power filter. No ending is locked.
Savior, Debtor and Fallen remain reachable.

Survivor route: intercom call button (21:00-06:00), buy passage from Prapor (300M roubles if case given / 500M if kept) and complete his timed tasks - or forfeit your Kappa container. Exit item: Prapor's letter for the port checkpoint.

decisions.question: Agree to find evidence on TerraGroup for Kerman?

effects.notes: Savior or Debtor depending on the final hand-over. Requires Intel Center 3 and the major evidence from They Are Already Here (a second chance is offered if missed).
Fallen route via Prapor: Case with dangerous cargo + $1,000,000 (plus extra Prapor tasks if you kept the armored case). Exit item: Reprogrammed RFID keycard with Prapor's hash codes.

decisions.question: Hand over all the TerraGroup evidence to Mr. Kerman?

effects.notes: All 8 major (optionally 36 minor) evidence items, then the Fence 4.0 rep chain, two co-op extracts (PvE: PMC-kill alternatives) and 0.4 BTR Driver standing. Exit item: Reprogrammed RFID keycard with Mr. Kerman's hash codes.

Debtor route via Lightkeeper: topographic intel flash drive, 30 PMC kills on Woods, 100 PMC dogtags, stash 6 Sacred Amulets on Lighthouse. Exit item: RFID keycard with unknown name (from LK for 1 Blue Folders material).

endings.name: Savior
endings.subtitle: For Humanity
endings.description: True ending. Trusted Kerman and delivered all the TerraGroup evidence; the truth escapes Tarkov with you and TerraGroup's mask is torn off. Requires the full evidence chain, Fence 4.0 rep and co-op extracts. Biggest reward haul ($200K + cases + weapons).

endings.name: Survivor
endings.subtitle: Selfish Escape
endings.description: Refused Kerman and bought passage from Prapor (300M/500M roubles). You escape alone while Tarkov burns behind you and TerraGroup is reborn. Cosmetic rewards only.

endings.name: Fallen
endings.subtitle: Into the Darkness
endings.description: Accepted Kerman but refused to gather evidence; escaped via Prapor with the dangerous cargo and $1M. TerraGroup returns as the world's false savior. Rewards: 10M roubles + money case.

endings.name: Debtor
endings.subtitle: Lightkeeper's Pawn
endings.description: Agreed to help Kerman but withheld the evidence; he marked you unreliable. Escaped through Lightkeeper's route, bound by a debt you carry out of Tarkov. Rewards: 120K euros + cases + weapons.
